name: Diva Hair Salon
author: Poki
description: Diva Hair Salon is a stylish simulation game where you craft the ultimate makeover experience. Wash, color, and blow-dry super realistic hair that moves and reacts like the real thing. Twist, smooth, and style each strand your way. Add trendy accessories, makeup, and chic outfits to complete the look. Ready to create hair magic? How do I play Diva Hair Salon? Use your mouse to select different options and use the various tools! Who created Diva Hair Salon? Diva Hair Salon is created by Happylander Ltd. Play their other games on Poki: Bottle Flip Challenge , Bowling Champion , Hit the Fan , Penalty Rivals , Ping Pong Go! , Speed Pool King , and Truck Slam ! How can I play Diva Hair Salon for free? You can play Diva Hair Salon for free on Poki. Can I play Diva Hair Salon on mobile devices and desktop? Diva Hair Salon can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
